title: rubus geocamptus
intro: Rubus geocamptus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a type of edible wild fruit-bearing shrub that belongs to the rose family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rubus geocamptus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve heart health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, jams, and infusions, which can be consumed fresh or dried to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
